title: Savory Juicy Moroccan Lamb Briouat
description: A flavorful and aromatic Moroccan dish featuring lamb, shredded coconut, and a hint of mustard, all wrapped in a crispy briouat pastry. This recipe is nut-free and features a unique shio-cure flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the lamb shoulder, shredded coconut, mustard paste, and shio-cure seasoning, and mix well.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
Add the lamb mixture to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Wrap the lamb mixture in the briouat pastry sheets, brushing the edges with water to seal.
Place the briouat on a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Serve the briouat hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
